title: River of Unrest
writer: Dudley Sturrock, Noel Scott, Dudley Leslie
actors: Antoinette Cellier, Niall MacGinnis, Maire O'Neill
plot: 1921: as Irish nationalists battle with British Forces, a young girl is torn between loyalty to her brother, unbeknownst to her an IRA leader, her fiance, a police inspector, and his comrade and rival in love, a British Army captain.
